description: Hunger, fullness, movement, and pain may all be felt in 'mokura', the soft abdominal region below the chest. 'kumoe' (stomach) is one digestive organ, while 'nulomi' (guts) gathers the intestines and inner workings.
articulatory_notes: Close the lips for voiced 'm', carry the sound through the nose, and release into middle-height back rounded 'o'. Raise the back of the tongue to the soft palate for unvoiced 'k' and release into stressed high-back rounded 'u'. Tap or briefly trill the tongue tip at the alveolar ridge, then open into central unrounded 'a'.

semantic_domains.physical: the abdominal region as a felt and visible part of the body
